subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-16
subcodes.first_line: Here is the Holy Land. It is a very good place. From all parts of the world people desire to come here... When I associate with pure and sanctified souls, my fatigue passes away
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @war and peace, @education of children; moral education, @predictions and prophecies, @universality of the Cause, @critique of Western values; culture
